article: The national space agency announced on Monday the launch of a new earth-observation satellite. The satellite will provide imagery for agricultural monitoring and disaster response. It was developed in partnership with a regional university. The next launch in the series is scheduled for early next year.
highlights: A new earth-observation satellite for agriculture and disaster response was launched today; another launch in the series is planned next year.

article: Heavy rain caused widespread flooding across central provinces this week. Thousands of residents have been evacuated from low-lying areas. The army has been deployed to assist with rescues and sandbagging. Forecasters expect the rain to continue for at least two more days.
highlights: Flooding from heavy rain has displaced thousands in central provinces; the army is helping and forecasters expect two more days of rain.

article: The country's central bank held its policy rate steady on Friday. The decision was widely expected by analysts. The accompanying statement struck a more dovish tone than markets had anticipated. Government bond prices rallied slightly after the announcement.
highlights: The central bank held rates steady but signalled a possible cut, prompting a small bond market rally.

article: A regional carrier announced a new direct flight between Hanoi and Sydney. The route will begin operating four times a week starting next month. The carrier said the flights will use its newest narrow-body aircraft. Introductory tickets sold out within twelve hours of going on sale.
highlights: A regional carrier will launch four-times-weekly direct Hanoi-Sydney flights; introductory tickets sold out within twelve hours.

article: Researchers have released a benchmark for long-context language models on multi-document summarisation. The benchmark covers aligned clusters of articles from multiple outlets. Early results showed strong factual coverage but struggles with attribution. Several frontier models were evaluated.
highlights: A new long-context benchmark tests multi-document summarisation; frontier models cover facts but struggle with attribution.

article: A coalition of universities has launched an open-access repository for Southeast Asian NLP datasets. The repository currently hosts over thirty corpora. Standardised loaders and licensing are provided. The initiative aims to lower the barrier to entry for students.
highlights: A consortium of universities has launched an open-access repository of more than thirty Southeast Asian NLP datasets.

article: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope have detected carbon dioxide in an exoplanet's atmosphere. The exoplanet is a gas giant roughly the size of Jupiter. The detection helps constrain models of how gas giants form. Several other atmospheres are queued for follow-up observations.
highlights: JWST has detected carbon dioxide in an exoplanet's atmosphere; the result helps constrain how gas giants form.

article: A major cloud provider has unveiled inference-optimised chips for large language model workloads. The company claims three times the throughput per dollar of the previous generation. A closed beta opens this week. General availability is scheduled for early next year.
highlights: A cloud provider announced inference chips claiming three-times-better throughput per dollar; a closed beta opens this week.
